name: Hot Pepper Jelly
recipeInstructions:
1. Wear gloves to seed and chop peppers.
2. Place the hot peppers, onion, and vinegar in a food processor and process until very fine.
3. Pour sugar into a heavy, non-aluminum pan and stir in the pepper mixture.
4. Bring to boil, and boil for 1 minute.
5. Stir in pectin, let come to rolling boil.
6. Remove from heat and skim off foam.
7. Ladle into sterilized jars and seal according to USDA approved methods.
8. Turn jars upside down and back again, 5 minutes each way, until jelly is cool and set - this keeps peppers mixed.
9. Makes about 4 pints.
